## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What should happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happens.

## Environment
- Browser: (e.g., Chrome 120)
- OS: (e.g., Windows 11, macOS 15)
- Page: (e.g., /studio, /network)

## Screenshots / Console Errors
If applicable, paste screenshots or console output.
